Software Developer.title: Software Developer
Software Developer.description: Build full-stack applications, learn architecture, and collaborate with product teams.

steps.title: Foundation Skills
steps.description: Learn programming fundamentals (variables, control flow, data structures), Git, and basic problem-solving.

steps.title: Core Technologies
steps.description: Master a modern frontend framework (React/Vue/Angular), backend (Node.js/Express), and databases (SQL/NoSQL).

steps.title: Advanced Concepts
steps.description: Learn testing, performance optimization, deployment, and system design for scalable apps.

steps.title: Practical Experience
steps.description: Build real projects, contribute to open source, and solve real-world problems to strengthen your portfolio.

steps.title: Career Launch
steps.description: Prepare your resume, profile, and interview skills to land your first (or next) developer role.

Data Scientist.title: Data Scientist
Data Scientist.description: Extract insights from data, build models, and communicate results to stakeholders.

steps.title: Statistics & Python
steps.description: Learn statistics, probability, Python programming, and libraries like pandas and numpy.

steps.title: Machine Learning Basics
steps.description: Understand supervised and unsupervised learning, and implement models with scikit-learn.

steps.title: Advanced Modeling
steps.description: Explore deep learning, time series, and model evaluation techniques.

steps.title: Real-World Projects
steps.description: Build end-to-end projects, deploy models, and work with large datasets.

steps.title: Job Preparation
steps.description: Polish your portfolio, craft case studies, and practice interviews for data science roles.

UI/UX Designer.title: UI/UX Designer
UI/UX Designer.description: Design user-friendly interfaces and create exceptional user experiences.

steps.title: Design Fundamentals
steps.description: Learn color theory, typography, layout, visual hierarchy, and design principles.

steps.title: Design Tools
steps.description: Master Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, and prototyping tools for wireframes and mockups.

steps.title: User Research
steps.description: Conduct user interviews, surveys, and create personas to understand user needs.

steps.title: Wireframing & Prototyping
steps.description: Create wireframes, interactive prototypes, and user flows for applications.

steps.title: Build Portfolio
steps.description: Create case studies showcasing your design process and solutions.

DevOps Engineer.title: DevOps Engineer
DevOps Engineer.description: Automate infrastructure, manage deployments, and ensure system reliability.

steps.title: Linux & Command Line
steps.description: Master Linux fundamentals, shell scripting, and command-line tools.

steps.title: Version Control & Git
steps.description: Learn Git, GitHub, GitLab, and CI/CD pipeline integration.

steps.title: Containerization
steps.description: Learn Docker, Kubernetes, and container orchestration.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Automate build, test, and deployment with Jenkins, GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Cloud Platforms
steps.description: Master AWS, Azure, or GCP services and cloud architecture.

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Learn Terraform, Ansible for automating infrastructure.

Product Manager.title: Product Manager
Product Manager.description: Define product strategy, manage roadmaps, and drive product success.

steps.title: Product Management Basics
steps.description: Learn product lifecycle, roadmaps, and the PM role.

steps.title: Market Research
steps.description: Conduct competitive analysis and identify customer pain points.

steps.title: User Research
steps.description: Learn user interviews, surveys, and persona creation.

steps.title: Agile & Scrum
steps.description: Master Agile, Scrum, sprint planning, and backlog management.

steps.title: Data-Driven Decisions
steps.description: Learn analytics tools and A/B testing for product decisions.

steps.title: Product Launch
steps.description: Plan launches, go-to-market strategies, and drive growth.

Machine Learning Engineer.title: Machine Learning Engineer
Machine Learning Engineer.description: Build, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale.

steps.title: Python Programming
steps.description: Master Python, NumPy, Pandas for ML development.

steps.title: Mathematics for ML
steps.description: Study linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics.

steps.title: Machine Learning Algorithms
steps.description: Learn supervised, unsupervised learning, and ensemble methods.

steps.title: Deep Learning
steps.description: Master TensorFlow, PyTorch, CNNs, RNNs, and transformers.

steps.title: MLOps & Deployment
steps.description: Deploy models using Flask, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud.

steps.title: Build ML Projects
steps.description: Work on real-world ML projects and applications.
